testcase.name: test_analyze_wallet_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error. BUG: datetime comparison error in check_usage_limit() assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mvp_features.py:181: in test_analyze_wallet_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}. BUG: datetime comparison error in check_usage_limit()" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error. BUG: datetime comparison error in check_usage_limit() E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_analyze_wallet_invalid_address

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 or 422, got 500: Internal Server Error. BUG: datetime comparison error in check_usage_limit() assert 500 in [400, 422] + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mvp_features.py:204: in test_analyze_wallet_invalid_address assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400 or 422, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}. BUG: datetime comparison error in check_usage_limit()" E AssertionError: Expected 400 or 422, got 500: Internal Server Error. BUG: datetime comparison error in check_usage_limit() E assert 500 in [400, 422] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
